result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mon...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_events AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM case_events
  WHERE owner_change_cnt <= 1
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) / 60.0 AS handle_time_minutes
  FROM not_transferred_cases
),
case_counts AS (
  -- count of cases an agent was involved with (initial assignment or transfer-to)
  SELECT
    newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS cases_involved
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    ht.agent_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_time_minutes) AS avg_handle_time_minutes,
    COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0) AS cases_involved
  FROM handle_times ht
  LEFT JOIN case_counts cc
    ON cc.agent_id = ht.agent_id
  GROUP BY ht.agent_id, COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0)
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agg
WHERE cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_minutes ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_events AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM case_events
  WHERE owner_change_cnt <= 1
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) / 60.0 AS handle_time_minutes
  FROM not_transferred_cases
),
case_counts AS (
  -- count of cases an agent was involved with (initial assignment or transfer-to)
  SELECT
    newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS cases_involved
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    ht.agent_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_time_minutes) AS avg_handle_time_minutes,
    COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0) AS cases_involved
  FROM handle_times ht
  LEFT JOIN case_counts cc
    ON cc.agent_id = ht.agent_id
  GROUP BY ht.agent_id, COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0)
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agg
WHERE cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_minutes ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_events AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM case_events
  WHERE owner_change_cnt <= 1
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) / 60.0 AS handle_time_minutes
  FROM not_transferred_cases
),
case_counts AS (
  -- count of cases an agent was involved with (initial assignment or transfer-to)
  SELECT
    newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS cases_involved
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    ht.agent_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_time_minutes) AS avg_handle_time_minutes,
    COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0) AS cases_involved
  FROM handle_times ht
  LEFT JOIN case_counts cc
    ON cc.agent_id = ht.agent_id
  GROUP BY ht.agent_id, COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0)
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agg
WHERE cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_minutes ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_events AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM case_events
  WHERE owner_change_cnt <= 1
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) / 60.0 AS handle_time_minutes
  FROM not_transferred_cases
),
case_counts AS (
  SELECT
    ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS cases_involved
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    ht.agent_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_time_minutes) AS avg_handle_time_minutes,
    COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0) AS cases_involved
  FROM handle_times ht
  LEFT JOIN case_counts cc
    ON cc.agent_id = ht.agent_id
  GROUP BY ht.agent_id, COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0)
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agg
WHERE cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_minutes ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH case_events AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM case_events
  WHERE owner_change_cnt <= 1
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) / 60.0 AS handle_time_minutes
  FROM not_transferred_cases
),
case_counts AS (
  SELECT
    ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS cases_involved
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    ht.agent_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_time_minutes) AS avg_handle_time_minutes,
    COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0) AS cases_involved
  FROM handle_times ht
  LEFT JOIN case_counts cc
    ON cc.agent_id = ht.agent_id
  GROUP BY ht.agent_id, COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0)

SELECT agent_id
FROM agg
WHERE cases_involved > 1

LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_events AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    c.ownerid AS final_ownerid,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM case_events
  WHERE owner_change_cnt <= 1
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    final_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) / 60.0 AS handle_time_minutes
  FROM not_transferred_cases
),
case_counts AS (
  SELECT
    c.ownerid AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS cases_involved
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  GROUP BY c.ownerid
  UNION
  SELECT
    ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS cases_involved
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
),
case_counts_agg AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cases_involved) AS cases_involved
  FROM case_counts
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    ht.agent_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_time_minutes) AS avg_handle_time_minutes,
    COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0) AS cases_involved
  FROM handle_times ht
  LEFT JOIN case_counts_agg cc
    ON cc.agent_id = ht.agent_id
  GROUP BY ht.agent_id, COALESCE(cc.cases_involved, 0)
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agg
WHERE cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_minutes ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

  GROUP BY c.ownerid

  SELECT
    ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS cases_involved
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    ht.agent_id,

  FROM handle_times ht

    ON cc.agent_id = ht.agent_id

)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agg

ORDER BY avg_handle_time_minutes ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
